description_long: This is a rustic, wooden bucket with an octagonal shape, featuring a pronounced wood grain texture and reinforced by two wide, black metal bands encircling its body. The bucket is adorned with a red, stylized flower motif on its side, adding a decorative touch. A single, robust metal handle with an angular, hammered appearance is attached to one side, allowing for easy carrying. The interior is open and appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids or small items. The wood shows a natural, slightly weathered finish, suggesting durability and outdoor use. The overall design evokes a handcrafted, traditional aesthetic, likely intended for practical use in urban or garden settings.
description: A rustic, octagonal wooden bucket with black metal bands, a red flower motif, and a sturdy metal handle. The bucket has a weathered finish and an open top for carrying or holding items.
description_view_0: The bucket's front view shows the red flower motif, wood grain, and both metal bands clearly, with the handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: The handle is centered and prominent, obscuring the flower motif and most of the bucket's front face.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the bucket is shown, with the handle on the left and the flower motif visible on the right.
description_view_3: The back of the bucket is visible, showing only the wood texture and metal bands, with no handle or motif in view.
